summary: Eight seconds of raw vertical phone footage of ICE officers (plate carriers reading 'POLICE - Enforcement and Removal Operations', Black Rifle Coffee Company caps) handcuffing and walking a detained man to a vehicle outside a Sheetz gas station. Although the audio track produced a high music_score, the transcript is hallucinated gibberish and there is no actual song, narration, graphics, or cinematic/fast-cut editing; it is unstylized field arrest footage despite the jokey '2 birds with one stone' caption, so it does not qualify as produced youth-appeal content.
notable_text: Officer vest text: 'POLICE - ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS'; 'Black Rifle Coffee Company' caps; on-location signage: 'SHEETZ'. No on-screen titles or slogans.
